<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  val bind :
    ?transition_duration:float ->
    ?min:(unit -> int) Eliom.Client_value.t ->
    ?max:(unit -> int) Eliom.Client_value.t ->
    compute_final_pos:(Js_of_ocaml.Dom_html.touchEvent Js_of_ocaml.Js.t ->
                       int -> int)
                      Eliom.Client_value.t ->
    ?onstart:(Js_of_ocaml.Dom_html.touchEvent Js_of_ocaml.Js.t -> int -> unit)
             Eliom.Client_value.t ->
    ?onmove:(Js_of_ocaml.Dom_html.touchEvent Js_of_ocaml.Js.t -> int -> unit)
            Eliom.Client_value.t ->
    ?onend:(Js_of_ocaml.Dom_html.touchEvent Js_of_ocaml.Js.t -> int -> unit)
           Eliom.Client_value.t ->
    Html_types.div_content Eliom.Content.Html.elt -> unit
end >>
